banners.bring.title: Earn ADA while you shop 🛍️
banners.bring.desc: Get rewarded with instant ADA cashback on every fiat purchase - stack up your portfolio effortlessly.

banners.usda.desc: Swap USDA effortlessly within Yoroi and enjoy the power of Cardano's first native stablecoin.

banners.midnight.midnightSupport: Yoroi will support Midnight’s multi-phase token distribution — a bold initiative to empower a diverse, global community.
buysell.dialog.disclaimerText: Yoroi Wallet utilizes third-party web3 on-and-off ramp solutions for direct Fiat-ADA exchanges.  By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to our partner's website, where you may need to accept their terms and conditions.  Please note, the third party web3 solution may have limitations based on your location and financial institution.
buysell.dialog.error.dialog.title: url generation
buysell.dialog.fail.text: This service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
buysell.dialog.longloading.text: We are redirecting you outside Yoroi. Please wait.
buysell.dialog.title: Buy / Sell ADA
buysell.end.text: Congrats! 🎉 Your transaction is now in progress. You should be receiving the funds soon.
buySell.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
buySell.disclaimer.description: By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to a third-party service provider offering Web3 on-and-off ramp solutions for fiat-to-ADA exchanges. You may be required to agree to the terms, conditions, and privacy policies of the third-party provider to complete the transaction. Yoroi Wallet does not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, security, policies, or services provided by the third party.
buySell.disclaimer.note1: Yoroi Wallet is not liable for any losses, delays, or errors that may occur while using the third-party service.
buySell.disclaimer.note2: Transactions may be subject to restrictions based on your geographic location, applicable laws, financial institution policies, or the service provider's limitations.
buySell.disclaimer.note3: Ensure you review and understand the third party's terms, as your interactions are solely governed by their agreements.
buySell.disclaimer.note4: Yoroi Wallet does not collect or store any personal or financial data submitted through the third-party platform.

cashback.disclaimer: By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to a third-party service provider offering cashback services in ADA currency. You may be required to agree to the terms, conditions, and privacy policies of the third-party provider to complete the transaction. Yoroi Wallet does not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, security, policies, or services provided by the third party.

cashback.disclaimer.note.2: 2. Transactions may be subject to restrictions based on your geographic location, applicable laws, financial institution policies, or the service provider's limitations.

cashback.disclaimer.note.4: 4. Yoroi Wallet does not collect or store any personal or financial data submitted through the third-party platform.

To claim your ADA cashback, either switch to the rewards wallet or change the rewards wallet to the one you're using now. You can always access settings at anytime to change your cashback wallet and make claiming rewards relevant for you.

Switch wallet to access your rewards or set this wallet as your cashback wallet.

profile.analytics.collectedData: Collected data includes: visited Yoroi extension pages, browser version, selected language, time of analytical events

profile.analytics.line2: You can always opt-out via Settings and it won’t impact your experience
profile.analytics.rejectionImpact: Opting out won’t impact your experience
profile.analytics.share: Share user insights to help us fine tune Yoroi to better serve user preferences and needs.
profile.analytics.title: Join the journey to improve Yoroi
profile.complexityLevel.advanced.descrip: Eu tenho algum conhecimento sobre blockchain e como a criptografia é usada para alimentar o próprio blockchain e o software de carteira. Eu estou bem em ver opções e funcionalidades que dependem criticamente da minha compreensão desses conceitos.
profile.complexityLevel.selected.label: O seu nível atual de complexidade é
profile.complexityLevel.selected.labelWi: Your current level of Complexity is : {level}
profile.complexityLevel.simple.descripti: Experiência mais simples possível. Nenhum conhecimento prévio em Blockchain é necessário. Altamente amigável para iniciantes a bordo e para usuários que preferem simplicidade.
profile.complexityLevel.subtitle: Entender o blockchain pode ser difícil, e é por isso que tentaremos manter a interface o mais simples possível para você
profile.complexityLevel.title: Nível de complexidade da interface
profile.languageSelect.title: Language Select
profile.languageSelect.tosAgreement: I agree with <tosLink>Terms of Service Agreement</tosLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>
profile.nightly.header: Yoroi Nightly is periodically updated with the latest in-progress features. Although we will never intentionally push bugs or broken code, features may still be in-progress or contain errors.
profile.nightly.recommendation1: Você usa carteiras com saldo pequeno para minimizar seu risco.
profile.nightly.recommendation2: Você pode comunicar quaisquer problemas a EMURGO por meio do canal Yoroi Nightly.
profile.nightly.title: Yoroi Nightly
profile.nightly.warning1: O Yoroi Nightly NÃO opera em um blockchain ou servidor de teste simulado.
profile.nightly.warning2: Todas as transações enviadas serão visíveis on-chain e nos servidores de produção.
profile.nightly.warningHeader: Para simular um ambiente de produção:
profile.termsOfUse.updateText: We have updated our Terms of Service Agreement and Privacy Policy to enhance your experience. Please review and accept them to keep enjoying Yoroi.

serverError.label.message: WARNING: Server experiencing difficulties.{newLine}Please check <yoroiXLink>our Twitter account</yoroiXLink>.{newLine}The displayed balance and transaction history may appear incorrect until our servers are back to normal, but your actual balance is not affected.
settings.display.blog: You can read our {blogLink} on how to use this feature.
settings.externalStorage.intro: Selecione um serviço de armazenamento externo para conectar sua conta e salvar suas notas.
settings.externalStorage.title: Conectar uma conta
settings.general.aboutYoroi.label: Sobre o Yoroi
settings.general.languageSelect.info: Para a Emurgo, fornecer suporte na Yoroi Wallet é um tópico importantíssimo. Nós acreditamos que entender os conceitos da tecnologia blockchain é mais simples em sua língua nativa. Nos esforçamos para disponibilizar tantas línguas quanto for possível, e para alcançar esse objetivo contamos com a ajuda de tradutores voluntários. A tradução da língua selecionada foi completamente feita pela comunidade.
settings.general.languageSelect.labelInf: A tradução da língua selecionada foi totalmente realizada pela comunidade
settings.general.switchNetwork.dialog.te: The Cardano network is a technical infrastructure combining Cardano nodes and their interactions in one unified system. It consists of a collection of nodes that communicate with each other to maintain the distributed ledger.
settings.general.testnetModal.title: What are the test networks?
settings.general.testnetModal.subtitle: The test networks serve as a platform for the community and developers to test products and experiments without risking real funds on the mainnet.
settings.general.testnetModal.cannotBeSe: Cannot be sent to mainnet wallets.
settings.general.testnetModal.easilyObta: Are easily obtainable from Cardano faucets.
settings.general.testnetModal.learnMore: Learn more about networks in Cardano

settings.cashback.title: Cashback rewards wallet
settings.cashback.note: Your connected wallet is the designated wallet for receiving ADA cashback rewards and applied to all partner websites. You can switch to a different wallet anytime to ensure your cashback is directed to your preferred wallet or select “None” to decline this service.
settings.cashback.label: Connected wallet
survey,description: Take our quick survey to help shape the future of Yoroi.
survey.title: We’d love your feedback!
swap.slippageInputInfo: Enter a value from 0% to 75%. You can also enter up to 1 decimal
swap.slippageInfo: Maximum allowed difference between expected and final price. Higher slippage improves success but may result in worse rates.
swap.actions.slippageToleranceTooltip: Slippage tolerance is set as a percentage of the total swap value. Your transactions will not be executed if the price moves by more than this amount
swap.actions.slippageToleranceHigh: When the slippage tolerance is set really high, it allows the transaction to still complete despite large price swings. This can open the door to front-running and sandwich attacks.
swap.cancelOrder.title: Cancel order
swap.cancelOrder.content: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
swap.totalReturnedTooltip: The amount returned to your wallet after cancelling the order
swap.routePath: Chosen path using Dexs and Pools for your swap to go through.
swap.limitPriceTooltip: Limit price in a DEX is a specific pre-set price at which you can trade an asset. Unlike market orders, which execute immediately at the current market price, limit orders are set to execute only when the market reaches the trader's specified price.
swap.limitPriceContent: Are you sure you want to proceed this order with the limit price that is 10% or more higher than the market price?
swap.marketPriceTooltip: Market price is the best price available on the market among several DEXes that lets you buy or sell an asset instantly
swap.priceImpactTooltip: Price impact is a difference between the actual market price and your price due to trade size.
swap.priceImpactSevere: Price impact over 10% may cause a significant loss of funds. Please bear this in mind and proceed with an extra caution.
swap.priceImpactNotSevere: Price impact over 1% may cause a difference in the amount you actually receive. Consider this at your own risk.
swap.noAssetFoundToSwap: No asset was found to swap
swap.pairNotAvailable: Selected pair is not available in any liquidity pool
swap.adaDepositTooltip: A small ADA deposit that will be returned when your order is processed or canceled
swap.guaranteedMin: Guaranteed minimum amount based on current liquidity and market conditions.
swap.minimumAssetsTooltip: The minimum amount you are guaranteed to receive in case of price slippage
swap.lpFeeTooltip: A fixed 0.3% operational fee paid to liquidity providers as a reward for supplying tokens, enabling traders to buy and sell assets on the decentralized Cardano network
swap.checkTx: Check this transaction in the list of wallet transactions
swap.txNotProcessed: Your transaction has not been processed properly due to technical issues
swap.notEnoughBalanceFees: Not enough balance, please consider the fees
swap.startDoingSwaps: Start doing the swap operations to see your open orders here
swap.testnet.message: Switch networks to be able to use Swap in Yoroi
swap.testnet.title: Swap is only available on the mainnet

Por favor, revise os detalhes da transação com cuidado. Você precisará pagar uma taxa de transação padrão na rede Cardano para realizar a transação.

wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.ledge: Ledger wallet é um pequeno dispositivo USB que adiciona um nível superior de segurança a sua wallet. É mais seguro porque sua chave privada nunca deixa a hardware wallet. Isso faz com que seus fundos sejam protegidos mesmo quando a segurança do seu computador é comprometida.
wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.trezo: Trezor wallet é um pequeno dispositivo USB que adiciona um nível superior de segurança a sua wallet. É mais seguro porque sua chave privada nunca deixa a hardware wallet. Isso faz com que seus fundos sejam protegidos mesmo quando a segurança do seu computador é comprometida.
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.normalWa: Se você possui uma frase de recuperação consistindo de {lengh} palavras, escolha essa opção para restaurar sua carteira.
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.paperWal: Se você possui uma Yoroi paper wallet, a qual é usualmente imprimida e mantida offline, você pode escolher esta opção para importar os fundos da mesma.
wallet.add.optionDialog.walletEra.byronE: As carteiras criadas antes de 29 de julho de 2020 são carteiras da era Byron e não podem delegar.
wallet.add.page.create.title: Criar wallet
wallet.add.page.create.tooltip:
Generate a new 15-word recovery phrase
and create a Yoroi wallet.
wallet.add.page.hw.title: Connect to  hardware wallet
wallet.add.page.hw.tooltip:
Create or restore a Yoroi wallet
using a Ledger or Trezor hardware wallet.
wallet.add.page.restore.title: Restore wallet
wallet.add.page.restore.tooltip:
Enter a 15-word recovery phrase
to restore an already-existing Yoroi wallet,
or import an existing Yoroi paper wallet.
wallet.add.page.subtitle.label: Yoroi light wallet for Cardano
wallet.add.page.title:
Your gateway
to the
financial world
wallet.address.category.addressBook: Endereços que não pertencem a você, mas são relevantes para sua carteira
wallet.address.category.byron: Endereços criados usando o formato de endereço da era Byron
wallet.address.category.group: Endereços formados pela combinação de uma chave de gastos e uma chave de stake
wallet.address.category.reward: Endereço para sua chave de staking
wallet.address.category.single: Addresses containing only a spending key and no staking key
wallet.backup.dialog.legacy.checkConfirm: Do you want to check if your wallet needs to be upgraded?
wallet.backup.dialog.legacy.explanation:
If you had any ADA in your wallet on November 29th, 2019
    you have to upgrade your wallet to a Shelley "reward wallet".
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.che: Tenha certeza de que não há ninguém olhando para sua tela, a menos que seja da sua vontade que essa pessoa tenha acesso a seus fundos.
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.rec: Na tela a seguir, você verá um conjunto de 15 palavras aleatórias. Esta é a sua frase de backup da carteira. Você pode inserir em qualquer versão da Yoroi para fazer backup ou restaurar os fundos e a chave privada da sua carteira.
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.display.di:
Por favor, certifique-se de ter anotado cuidadosamente sua frase de recuperação em algum lugar seguro.
    Você precisará dessa frase para usar e restaurar sua carteira. A frase diferencia maiúsculas de minúsculas.
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.entry.dial: Entendo que minhas chaves secretas são mantidas em segurança apenas neste dispositivo, não nos servidores da empresa.

Entendo que, se esse aplicativo for movido para outro dispositivo ou excluído, meu dinheiro poderá
    só ser recuperado com a frase de backup que escrevi e salvei em um local seguro.
Toque em cada palavra na ordem correta para verificar sua frase de recuperação

wallet.create.dialog.howToSaveRecoveryPh: Make sure no one is looking at your screen.
It is recommended to have 2 or 3 copies of the recovery phrase in different secure locations.
Write the recovery phrase on a piece of paper and store in a secure location like a safety deposit box.
How to save your recovery phrase?
wallet.create.dialog.name.label: Nome da carteira
Remember: you are the only person who should know this recovery phrase.
DO NOT share the recovery phrase as this will allow anyone to access your assets and wallet.
If you lose your recovery phrase, it will not be possible to recover your wallet.
The recovery phrase is the only way to access your wallet.
Yoroi will NEVER ask for the recovery phrase. Watch out for scammers and impersonators.
Read this before saving your recovery phrase

wallet.create.dialog.walletNameAndPasswo: It is a wallet identifier that helps you to easier find the exact wallet in your app
You can have different wallet names for the same wallet account connected to different devices
Password is an additional security layer used to confirm transactions from this device
Both wallet name and password are stored locally, so you are only person who can change or restore it.

wallet.transfer.deregister.line5: Desaverbar significa que está chave não receberá recompensas até que você registre a chave de stake novamente, (normalmente isso é feito delegando para uma pool novamente)

wallet.voting.line2: Before you begin, make sure to complete steps below
wallet.voting.line4: Open the Catalyst Voting App and click on the Complete registration button.
wallet.voting.notDelegated: You haven't delegated anything. Your voting power is determined by the amount you delegate and voting rewards are distributed to your delegation reward address. Please remember to delegate prior to voting.
wallet.voting.trezorTRequirement: <updateLink>Update</updateLink> your Trezor device firmware version to 2.4.1 or above.
wallet.withdrawRewards.transaction.title: Withdraw reward
wallet.withdrawal.transaction.unregister: Essa transação irá revogar uma ou mais chave de participação, reembolsando suas {refundAmount}{ticker} pagas como depósito no registro de sua chave de participação
yoroiTransfer.error.noTransferTxError: Não há uma transferência a ser enviada.
yoroiTransfer.error.transferFundsError: Não foi possível transferir os fundos.
yoroiTransfer.error.walletChangedError: A Wallet foi alterada. Por favor reconfirme sua transação.
yoroiTransfer.form.instructions.step0Pap: Entre as 21 palavras de recuperação usadas para o backup da sua Yoroi Paper Wallet e sua senha da paper wallet para restaurar o saldo e transferir todos os fundos.
yoroiTransfer.successPage.text: Seus fundos foram transferidos com sucesso.
yoroiTransfer.successPage.title: sucesso
yoroiTransfer.waiting.title.label: A wallet está sendo restaurada

gouvernace.participateDialog.title: Withdraw warning
gouvernace.participateDialog.contentInfo: To withdraw your rewards, you need to participate in the Cardano Governance. Your rewards will continue to accumulate, but you are only able to withdraw it once you join the Governance process.

Your delegation helps shape Cardano's future.

governance.banner.title: New to Governance? Start here
governance.banner.text: Your ADA can make a difference. Delegate to a DRep to represent your vote and participate in Cardano governance.
governance.delegateToYoroi:
Support the Commercial and Technical adoption of the Cardano roadmap.
Please note Yoroi is part of the EMURGO Group.
governance.participateDialog.title: Withdraw warning
governance.participateDialog.contentInfo: To withdraw your rewards, you need to participate in the Cardano Governance. Your rewards will continue to accumulate, but you are only able to withdraw it once you join the Governance process.
governance.participatingInGovernance: Participating in the Cardano Governance gives you the opportunity to participate in the voting as well as withdraw your staking rewards
governance.designatedSomeone: You are designating someone else to cast your vote on your behalf for all proposals now and in the future.
governance.identifyDrep: Identify your preferred DRep and enter their ID below to delegate your vote:
governance.needAdaForParticipation: To participate in governance you need to have ADA in your wallet.

transaction.review.enterPassword: Enter password to sign this transaction
transaction.review.identifyDrep: Identify your preferred DRep and enter their ID below to delegate your vote:
transaction.review.collateralInfo: Collateral is mandatory when interacting with certain smart contracts on Cardano. ADA will only be deduced from your collateral if transaction validation fails.
transaction.review.interactWithOperation: You are about to interact with operations, which are key components used in governance and various blockchain activities. These include Cardano Governance Certificates, as outlined in CIP-0095, which facilitate governance transactions.
transaction.review.takeHardwareWallet: Take your hardware wallet device and follow the instructions there. Make sure you confirm a trusted action.
transaction.review.rewardsWithdraw: Your rewards will automatically get withdrawn once you undelegate from a stake pool. You will also receive back your staking deposit of 2 ADA. If you wish to choose another stake pool, you can change your preference without undelegation.
